description: A tour group has a booking and wants to be seated together. A reservations agent must block a group of seats for them.

nodes.task_description: Find a block of adjacent seats on the seat map that can accommodate the entire group.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable block of seats.

nodes.task_description: Assign the seats to the passengers in the group booking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully assigns all passengers to seats in the block.
